allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $ico = [System.Drawing.Icon]::ExtractAssociatedIcon\("C:\\projects\\carsigo-admin\\Public\\assets\\icon.ico"\); if \($ico\) { $bitmap = $ico.ToBitmap\(\); $bitmap.Save\("C:\\projects\\carsigo-admin\\carsigo-mobile\\assets\\app_icon.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); Write-Output "Saved app_icon.png \($\($bitmap.Width\)x$\($bitmap.Height\)\)"; $bitmap.Dispose\(\); $ico.Dispose\(\) } else { Write-Output "Failed to load icon" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\flutter\\bin\\cache\\dart-sdk\\bin\\dart.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($? -eq $false -or -not \(Test-Path "C:\\flutter\\bin\\cache\\dart-sdk\\bin\\dart.exe"\)\) { Write-Output "DART SDK MISSING FROM CACHE" }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\flutter\\internal" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
